args.query: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate <= '2023-04-10' AND (field__c ILIKE '%owner%' OR field__c ILIKE '%ownerid%');

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate <= '2023-04-10' AND (field__c ILIKE '%owner%' OR field__c ILIKE '%ownerid%');
